'''wakate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:hiddenly|hiddenly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-k-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hiddenly|hiddenly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| wakate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:wakate|wakate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:wakatesher|wakatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wakatesherĂ«m|wakatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wakatero|wakatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wakateshĂ«|wakateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wakateshĂ«m|wakateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwakatero|gokiwakatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwakateshĂ«|gokiwakateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwakateshĂ«m|gokiwakateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gowakankerom|gowakankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowakankeshĂ«|gowakankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowakankeshĂ«m|gowakankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gowakankeya|gowakankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wakaterom|wakaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wakatemu|wakatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:wakateya|wakateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwakaterom|gokiwakaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwakatemu|gokiwakatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiwakateya|gokiwakateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:wakakate|wakakate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:wakakatesher|wakakatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wakakatesherĂ«m|wakakatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wakakatero|wakakatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wakakateshĂ«|wakakateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wakakateshĂ«m|wakakateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwakakatero|gokiwakakatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwakakateshĂ«|gokiwakakateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwakakateshĂ«m|gokiwakakateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gowakakankerom|gowakakankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowakakankeshĂ«|gowakakankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowakakankeshĂ«m|gowakakankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gowakakankeya|gowakakankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wakakaterom|wakakaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wakakatemu|wakakatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:wakakateya|wakakateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwakakaterom|gokiwakakaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwakakatemu|gokiwakakatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiwakakateya|gokiwakakateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:wĂŠkĂŠte|wĂŠkĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:wĂŠkĂŠtesher|wĂŠkĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wĂŠkĂŠtesherĂ«m|wĂŠkĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wĂŠkĂŠtero|wĂŠkĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«|wĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«m|wĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠkĂŠtero|gokiwĂŠkĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«|gokiwĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«m|gokiwĂŠkĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gowĂŠkĂŠnkerom|gowĂŠkĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowĂŠkĂŠnkeshĂ«|gowĂŠkĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowĂŠkĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gowĂŠkĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gowĂŠkĂŠnkeya|gowĂŠkĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wĂŠkĂŠterom|wĂŠkĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wĂŠkĂŠtemu|wĂŠkĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:wĂŠkĂŠteya|wĂŠkĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠkĂŠterom|gokiwĂŠkĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠkĂŠtemu|gokiwĂŠkĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiwĂŠkĂŠteya|gokiwĂŠkĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:wafkafte|wafkafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:wafkaftesher|wafkaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wafkaftesherĂ«m|wafkaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wafkaftero|wafkaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:wafkafteshĂ«|wafkafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wafkafteshĂ«m|wafkafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwafkaftero|gokiwafkaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiwafkafteshĂ«|gokiwafkafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwafkafteshĂ«m|gokiwafkafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gowafkafnkerom|gowafkafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowafkafnkeshĂ«|gowafkafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowafkafnkeshĂ«m|gowafkafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gowafkafnkeya|gowafkafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:wafkafterom|wafkafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:wafkaftemu|wafkaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:wafkafteya|wafkafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiwafkafterom|gokiwafkafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiwafkaftemu|gokiwafkaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiwafkafteya|gokiwafkafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
